creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #1)
My bad. I got caught in bad timing. I updated my system June 29, I thought long enough after SSL-3.0 landed to be safe. Looks like beefy18 did not compete a build of all packages, including gsoap2, until July 2. The full package build that should have caught this crashed, delaying package update to post ssl-3.0.

I'll close the ticket, though someone else may have been unfortunate enough to get bitten by this.
